THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRETZSCHMAR, MERLIN KRETZSCHMAR, LORINE ANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WINTON, DAVID WINTON, CHRISTINA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WINTON, DAVID WINTON, CHRISTINA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT KRETZSCHMAR, MERLIN KRETZSCHMAR, LORINE ANN $95.92 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $127.92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
